name: Top-Down Battle Royale Starter
description: Top-down multiplayer-style battle royale (single player vs AI bots). Large TileMap arena with shrinking safe zone (Area2D circle reducing radius). Weapon pickups: pistol (fast, low damage), shotgun (close-range, high damage), rifle (medium range), sniper (long range, slow). Ammo system. Health + shield resource. Loot drops from eliminated players. Bot AI with states (loot, engage, flee to zone, camp). Minimap showing zone and positions. Kill feed. Match progression to victory.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project config with physics and AutoLoads: MatchManager (singleton), ZoneManager (singleton)

scenes/.arena.tscn: Root Node2D with TileMap (terrain, buildings, obstacles), Player, BotSpawner, ZoneCircle (Area2D), LootSpawner, UI CanvasLayer
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D (top-down player), CollisionShape2D, HealthComponent, ShieldComponent, WeaponSlots (4 slots), AmmoManager, InputHandler
scenes/.bot.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D (bot sprite), CollisionShape2D, BotAI, HealthComponent, WeaponSlots, SimplePathing (no advanced pathfinding, grid-based navigation)
scenes/.weapons/pistol.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D (weapon icon), WeaponBase script, properties: damage=15, fire_rate=0.2s, ammo_capacity=30, spread=5°
scenes/.weapons/shotgun.tscn: Node2D with WeaponBase, damage=40, fire_rate=0.8s, ammo_capacity=8, spread=15°, fires 8 pellets per shot
scenes/.weapons/rifle.tscn: Node2D with WeaponBase, damage=25, fire_rate=0.1s, ammo_capacity=60, spread=2°, semi-auto or burst
scenes/.weapons/sniper.tscn: Node2D with WeaponBase, damage=80, fire_rate=2.0s, ammo_capacity=10, spread=0°, scope zoom
scenes/.loot_crate.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (crate icon), LootGenerator child, pickup triggers on area_entered(player)
scenes/.zone_circle.tscn: Area2D with CircleShape2D, Polygon2D for visual ring, AnimationPlayer for shrinking animation
scenes/.projectile.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (bullet), CollisionShape2D (small circle), velocity property, on area_entered triggers damage
scenes/.ui/minimap.tscn: CanvasLayer TextureRect or custom renderer showing: arena background, zone circle, all player positions (color: red=player, yellow=bot, white=dead), weapon icons at positions
scenes/.ui/health_shield.tscn: CanvasLayer VBoxContainer with two ProgressBars: health_bar (red, 0-100) and shield_bar (blue, 0-100)
scenes/.ui/kill_feed.tscn: CanvasLayer VBoxContainer with RichTextLabel showing kill log entries (format: 'BotA killed BotB with Sniper', auto-scrolls, fades after 5s)
scenes/.ui/weapon_slot.tscn: CanvasLayer with 4 item slots showing equipped weapons, ammo count, selected slot highlighted
scenes/.ui/alive_counter.tscn: CanvasLayer Label showing 'Players Alive: X/Y' counting living players and bots

scripts/.player_controller.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Properties: current_weapon (WeaponBase reference), current_weapon_slot (0-3), movement_speed (300). Methods: handle_input() captures WASD movement, mouse aiming, left-click fire, scroll select weapon, E pickup. _physics_process() applies velocity and collision with terrain. Signals: player_died, player_killed_someone, weapon_switched
scripts/.weapon_base.gd: Base script for all weapons. Properties: damage (int), fire_rate (float), ammo_capacity (int), ammo_current (int), spread_angle (float), bullets_per_shot (int, 1 for rifle/pistol/sniper, 8 for shotgun). Methods: fire(origin_pos, direction) → spawns Projectile instances with slight spread. reload() resets ammo_current to capacity. Signals: fired, out_of_ammo
scripts/.bot_ai.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Properties: state (looting/engaging/fleeing/camping), target_player (reference to player or nearest bot), last_known_position (Vector2). Methods: _physics_process() implements state machine. In looting: moves to nearest loot_crate. In engaging: pathfinds to target, fires weapon. In fleeing: moves toward zone center. In camping: stays at position, scans for targets. Changes state based on health, proximity to zone, enemy presence. Signals: bot_died, bot_engaged
scripts/.zone_manager.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Properties: zone_center (Vector2), zone_radius (float, starts 2000, shrinks to 200 over 5 minutes). Methods: update_zone(elapsed_time) shrinks radius linearly. is_in_zone(position) returns bool. Methods: get_zone_radius(), get_time_to_shrink(). On _process(), applies damage to players outside zone (10 HP/sec). Signals: zone_shrinking, zone_shrunk
scripts/.loot_system.gd: Manages loot drops. Methods: generate_loot(position) → spawns random weapon + ammo at position. Uses weighted table: Pistol 40%, Shotgun 20%, Rifle 25%, Sniper 15%. Drop chance per kill: 50% weapon drop. Stores loot_crates array
scripts/.health_system.gd: Attached to player and bot. Properties: max_health (100), current_health (int), on_death_callback. Methods: take_damage(amount) reduces health, triggers death at 0. heal(amount) increases health up to max. Signals: health_changed, died. Applies iframes (0.5s invulnerability) after hit
scripts/.kill_tracker.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Tracks: kills_this_match (player int), deaths_this_match (player int), kill_log (array of {killer, victim, weapon} objects). Methods: log_kill(killer_name, victim_name, weapon_name), get_kill_feed(limit=10) returns last N kills
scripts/.match_manager.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Manages match state (loading/playing/finished). Properties: alive_players (int), alive_bots (int), total_bots (int). Methods: spawn_bots(count) instantiates Bot.tscn at random locations. check_victory() if only player alive, ends match with victory. check_defeat() if player dead. update_alive_count() after each death. Signals: match_started, match_ended(winner), player_eliminated, bot_eliminated

assets/.tilesets/arena.tres: TileSet with grass, buildings (solid collision), trees, water, walls, rocks (obstacles)
assets/.sprites/player.png: 32x32 top-down player sprite with idle, running, aiming frames for 8 directions
assets/.sprites/bots/: 32x32 bot sprites (different colors) with animation frames
assets/.sprites/weapons/: 16x16 weapon icons (pistol, shotgun, rifle, sniper) for UI
assets/.sprites/ui/: Zone circle texture, health/shield icons, kill feed icons
assets/.sfx/: gunshot_pistol.wav, gunshot_shotgun.wav, gunshot_rifle.wav, gunshot_sniper.wav, hit_impact.wav, shield_break.wav, elimination.wav, zone_warning.wav
assets/.fonts/: Default and monospace fonts for UI

preBuiltMechanics: Large TileMap arena with terrain, buildings, and obstacle collision
Shrinking circular safe zone (Area2D) that reduces radius over 5-minute match, damages outside
4 weapon types: Pistol (15 dmg, 0.2s fire rate), Shotgun (40 dmg x8 pellets, 0.8s), Rifle (25 dmg, 0.1s), Sniper (80 dmg, 2.0s)
Ammo system with capacity per weapon, pickup from loot crates and eliminated players
Health (100 HP) and Shield (100 points) dual resource system
Weapon spread/inaccuracy based on weapon type (sniper 0°, pistol 5°, shotgun 15°)
Player aiming with mouse direction, firing with left-click
Bot AI with state machine (looting/engaging/fleeing to zone/camping)
Loot drops from eliminated players with weighted random selection
Minimap showing arena, zone, all players (color-coded), and weapons
Kill feed showing eliminations (killer, victim, weapon used)
Match progression: loading → playing → finished with victory/defeat screen
customizationPoints: Add vehicle system: jeeps, helicopters for rapid repositioning
Implement consumable items: healing potions, shield rechargers, buffs (speed, damage boost)
Create armor/equipment slots with random stat bonuses
Add grenades and explosives with physics-based throwing
Implement building destruction and dynamic environment changes
Add squads/team gameplay with shared loot and respawn mechanics
Create weather effects: fog reduces visibility, wind affects projectiles
Implement ranked progression with MMR system
Add cosmetic skins and loadout customization
Create training island for practice before matching
examplePrompts: Add grenade weapons: press G to throw, explodes after 3 seconds in 200px radius dealing 50 damage
Implement armor/equipment that can be looted: helmet (+25 health), vest (+50 health), backpack (increased ammo capacity)
Create consumable items: medical kit (+50 health), shield potion (+50 shield), adrenaline (+temporary speed boost)
Add vehicle spawns (helicopters) at fixed locations that can be piloted to any position on map
Implement destructible buildings: wooden structures can be broken, concrete resists damage
Create a spray painting mechanic for team markers visible to all teammates
Add glider deployment: players drop from airship with parachute, can steer to landing zone
Implement ping system for teammates to mark enemies/loot without voice
Create loadout presets allowing weapon/item priority selection before match
Add final circle spectator mode: eliminated players watch final player until victory
